description: always-visible pinned doc card with copy bar
rolling-merge distiller: window capture, interpolate voice, call llm slot, persist distillate
typed-moment extraction riding the distill pass (commitment/question/decision/artifact); requires distill.enabled
entity extraction + recency×frequency index riding the distill pass; requires distill.enabled (Moment.refs linking also needs distill.moments)

speech-to-text pre-distill stage: base64 audio/* chunks are transcribed via the stt slot into utf8 text before the distill pass; requires distill.enabled (no persistence path for transcribed-but-undistilled text)
Act pass on session end: compose a follow-up draft from the session's distillates + moments (prepared, never sent); needs distillates to draft anything, so distill.enabled must have run

context-switch detection: focus signals (window title + repo path) and calendar signals (current/imminent Calendar.app event title + attendees) feed the router, which auto-starts/switches sessions into the matched workspace when a candidate sustains dominance; attribution evidence stamped on every auto-started session

screen understanding: source:'screen' image frames are recognized via the ocr slot (paddle-serving, or an openai-compat VLM fallback) into an OcrResult + a distillate the standard surfaces read; runs on capture ingest, independent of distill.enabled

run the drain + session-end pipeline through the workflow executor against the seeded workflow-default document instead of the hardcoded direct-wiring; behavior-identical when ON (same distill/act flags honored), the legacy path when OFF (P4A executor v0)

task-extract act: on each drain (riding the distill pass), extract follow-up items from the session's accumulated distillates+moments into an editable to-do document; a follow-up draft un-constrains them via {{todo}}. Requires workflow.enabled + distill.enabled (P4A dynamic-to-do seam)

fast fields (#61): on newly transcribed material (the distill accumulation seam), fan out every triggered fast-tier prompt document CONCURRENTLY against the llm slot; each result publishes field.updated and persists the field's latest value (provisional). Rides the transcribed batch, so it needs distill.enabled + distill.transcribe to have text

judge stage (#62): at a LOWER cadence than the fast fan-out, review every judge-tier prompt document against the SAME source window PLUS the fast result set; confirm/correct/flag each reviewed field in place and stamp the overrule provenance (which judge, which template, what changed). Tier-gated on fabric contents — with no judge-capable llm endpoint (named llm.judge) it never schedules and fields stay provisional. Requires distill.fields to have produced values to judge
